title: calceolaria scapiflora

side_effects: Calceolaria scapiflora can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions in some individuals, including hives, itching, and swelling. In rare cases, excessive consumption of Calceolaria scapiflora has been linked to liver and kidney damage.
